domain: Node.js API deprecation lifecycle (real, version-controlled; DEP0033)

real_event.revocation_reason: the function was repurposed to also accept EventTarget arguments, so the deprecation was reversed

selection_method: Real, externally-verifiable reversal: a Node.js deprecation (DEP0033) that was later REVOKED. Chosen for X2-U1 because (a) the reversal is genuine and citable in version-controlled Node docs, (b) it is impersonal — no athlete/team/person, nothing to redact, (c) out-of-weights is earned: a DEP code's *current* status is obscure and the revocation shipped in v24.14.0/v25.4.0 (2025-2026, at/after the engines' cutoffs) — confirmed per-engine by the pre-run ignorance probe recorded in the run manifest. NOT a retraction (rw-*) and NOT the lab-authored Helix/Meridian fixtures.

corpus_identity_pin.not_lf_helix: lab-authored fictional site facts — X2-LB only, not this corpus
corpus_identity_pin.not_rw_0001_0004: retraction-corpus entries (M0) — different shape, not this corpus
